introSection:
Harborland (神戸ハーバーランド) is a shopping district in Chuo-ku, Kobe, Japan. Kobe Port Tower is located there.

This shopping district was made on the site of the former freight yard, Minatogawa Kamotsu Station of the Japanese National Railways. The yard was removed in 1982 and the shopping district opened in 1992.

sections.title: Access
sections.content:
* JR Kobe Station
 * Kosoku Kobe Station
 * Harborland Station

fullText:
Harborland (神戸ハーバーランド) is a shopping district in Chuo-ku, Kobe, Japan. Kobe Port Tower is located there.

This shopping district was made on the site of the former freight yard, Minatogawa Kamotsu Station of the Japanese National Railways. The yard was removed in 1982 and the shopping district opened in 1992.


 * JR Kobe Station
 * Kosoku Kobe Station
 * Harborland Station


 * Port of Kobe


 * Kobe Harborland Official Homepage
categories: Shopping districts and streets in Japan
